rows.description: Computus Thomas Stinton Coll. Exon. Rectoris a 2do Nov: 1795 ad eundem diem revolution 1796.
rows.notes: Selected gpt-5-mini's description as it is much more accurate ('Stinton', 'Exon.', 'diem revolution'). Both correctly identified as a header with no monetary values. Confirmed by visual verification.
Selected gpt-5-mini's description as 'recepta' is visually more accurate than 'recepita'. Both correctly identified as a header with no monetary values. Confirmed by visual verification.
All extractors agree on description and amounts. Visually verified as correct.

rows.description: Guinear Rectory half a year to Mich
rows.notes: Amounts are agreed upon and visually verified. Description is a combination: 'Guinear' from gpt-5-mini and 'Mich' from claude-haiku are visually more accurate than their respective alternatives. Confirmed by visual verification.

Selected gpt-5-mini. The description 'Kidlington' is accurate. Visually verified pence as '10' and fraction as '¾' (0.75), matching gpt-5-mini's reading. Claude-haiku incorrectly read '11' and '½'. Gpt-5-mini's note specifically identifying the 'superscript/mark interpreted as three farthings (¾)' was more convincing.
Amounts are agreed upon and visually verified. Description 'Garsington' from gpt-5-mini is more accurate than 'Gorsington'. Confirmed by visual verification.
Amounts are agreed upon and visually verified. Description 'Garsington Puckett' from gpt-5-mini is more accurate than 'Gorsington Brocket'. Confirmed by visual verification.
Amounts are agreed upon and visually verified. Description 'Tintonshul Napier' from gpt-5-mini is much more accurate than 'Stokefield Napiter'. Confirmed by visual verification.

Amounts are agreed upon and visually verified, including the 'ob' half-penny symbol. Description 'Tintonshul Beaton 5 years' from gpt-5-mini is more accurate than 'Tintonfield Beaton 3 years'. Confirmed by visual verification.
Amounts are agreed upon and visually verified. 'Alast' from gpt-5-mini is a slightly better reading of the cramped description than 'Aleah'. Confirmed by visual verification.
Amounts are agreed upon and visually verified. 'Clifton Finy' from gpt-5-mini is a better reading of the description than 'Clipton Ferry'. Confirmed by visual verification.

rows.description: South Newington Tenement Tho: Penn 1 year
rows.notes: Amounts are agreed upon and visually verified. gpt-5-mini's description 'South Newington Tenement Tho: Penn' is significantly more accurate than claude-haiku's 'South Havington Torment Fitz Pons'. Confirmed by visual verification.
Amounts are agreed upon and visually verified. gpt-5-mini's description 'Menherst' is more accurate than 'Ulmhuret'. Confirmed by visual verification.
Amounts are agreed upon and visually verified. gpt-5-mini's description 'Chase Hill' is more accurate than 'Chace Blake'. Confirmed by visual verification.

Amounts are agreed upon and visually verified. gpt-5-mini's description 'Benington 2 years Barrett and Burgess' is more accurate than 'Bemington 2 years Barrett aD Beueys'. Confirmed by visual verification.

Amounts are agreed upon and visually verified. gpt-5-mini's description 'Truttlewyn a year and a 1/2' was closer; adjusted to 'Trethewyn a year and ½' for visual accuracy. Claude-haiku's description was significantly off. Confirmed by visual verification.

Selected gpt-5-mini. This row was correctly identified by gpt-5-mini, but claude-haiku entirely missed it and replaced it with an invented row ('Lea Lands Comyon') with incorrect amounts. Visually verified 'Pad Lane Conyers 2 years' with amount '1.0.0'.
Amounts are agreed upon and visually verified. gpt-5-mini's description 'Pad Lane' is more accurate than 'Lad Lane'. Confirmed by visual verification.

rows.description: Pad Lane Hallifax late Warrel 2 years
rows.notes: Selected gpt-5-mini. Visually verified 'Pad Lane Hallifax late Warrel 2 years' with amount '3.6.8'. Claude-haiku's description and amounts for this row are entirely incorrect, suggesting a significant parsing error. Claude's own note expressing uncertainty ('may contain errors in reading') supported disqualifying its candidate for this row.

This row was correctly identified by gpt-5-mini but missed by claude-haiku. Visually verified the bracketed subtotal '17.13.4' in the image, and confirmed it sums correctly from the preceding Pad Lane entries (1.0.0 + 13.6.8 + 3.6.8 = 17.13.4).
Amounts are agreed upon and visually verified. gpt-5-mini's description 'Bampton' is more accurate than 'Warnflton'. Confirmed by visual verification.
Amounts are agreed upon and visually verified. gpt-5-mini's description 'S. G. Page Turner' is more accurate than 'S.G.Page Foreman'. Confirmed by visual verification.
Amounts are agreed upon and visually verified. gpt-5-mini's description 'Jesus College' is significantly more accurate than claude-haiku's 'Aitus Talley'. Confirmed by visual verification.
Amounts are agreed upon and visually verified. gpt-5-mini's description 'Back Gate Coppins' is more accurate than 'Back Gate Capins'. Confirmed by visual verification.
Amounts are agreed upon and visually verified. Description combined: 'Willd' is visible, and 'Arish' from gpt-5-mini is more accurate than 'Chish'. Confirmed by visual verification.

Description 'Summa' adopted from claude-haiku as it's directly written above the total. Visually verified pounds and shillings. Visually verified the fraction after 5 pence is clearly '¼' (0.25), matching gpt-5-mini and overriding claude-haiku's '½'.
